title: Http Server Bootstrap
description: Studio serves HTTP for the remote profile and embedded `ui serve` mode; listeners must start reliably, expose API routes under `/v1`, and shut down cleanly. This spec defines process-level server lifecycle: bind, mount handlers, health probe with auth metadata, and graceful SIGINT handling.
context: Studio serves HTTP for the remote profile and embedded `ui serve` mode; listeners must start reliably, expose API routes under `/v1`, and shut down cleanly. This spec defines process-level server lifecycle: bind, mount handlers, health probe with auth metadata, and graceful SIGINT handling.

rules: All Studio API route plugins MUST be registered under the `/v1` prefix. Non-API paths MAY serve static UI when configured.

rules.requirement: health endpoint reports readiness and auth type
rules: `GET /v1/health` (or equivalent) MUST return HTTP 200 with a JSON body that includes effective `auth.type` and does not leak secrets.
On `SIGINT` (and `SIGTERM` where supported), the server MUST stop accepting new connections and close within a bounded timeout.

Process startup MUST delegate kernel and graph bootstrap to `api:composition-create-api-server`, which in turn MUST use `createSdkContext` from `@specd/sdk`. This spec does not define an alternate `createKernel` entry point.

constraints: Server bootstrap MUST NOT call createKernel from @specd/core directly.
HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only disabled; no server-side Bearer enforcement on loopback or specd ui serve.
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw ChangeRepository.saveArtifact from HTTP handlers.
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.

scenarios.name: Change routes live under /v1/changes
when: integration client calls documented change route
then: AND router does not expose unprefixed duplicates

scenarios.name: Graph routes share /v1 namespace
then: AND legacy non-/v1 graph paths are absent

scenarios.requirement: health endpoint reports readiness and auth type
scenarios.name: Health returns 200 when server ready

scenarios.requirement: health endpoint reports readiness and auth type
scenarios.name: Health exposes effective auth type

scenarios.requirement: health endpoint reports readiness and auth type
scenarios.name: Health fails before bootstrap completes
SIGINT closes HTTP server
then: AND in-flight requests drain or timeout

scenarios.name: HTTP listen path uses SDK host context
when: Studio starts the HTTP server for a project
then: AND the process-scoped kernel is created only through createSdkContext
